error.peso_altura: Check weight and height: height (cm) must be greater than weight (kg). Did you swap them?
error.terms: You must accept the terms and conditions.
error.submit: There was an error submitting your application. Please try again.
error.cuota_cero: The reference installment cannot be 0. Check the amount and term.
error.doc_tipo_incorrecto: {doc}: the uploaded file looks like {detected}. Please upload the correct document.
error.doc_vencido: {doc}: the document is expired (expired on {date}). Please upload a valid document.

intro.title: 📋 Before you start
intro.body: Gather ALL your documents before starting the application. The system will not let you move to the next page if a required document is missing.
intro.doc_payslips: Recent payslips (1 to 3) — or pension letter if you are a pensioner
intro.doc_opcionales: Optional: passport or driver's license, proof of address (Aqualectra, phone bill or Kranshi extract)

step1.title: Identification
step1.hint: Upload a clear photo of your ID. We will extract your information automatically.
step1.tipo_empleado_hint: If you are a pensioner, payslips are optional — you can use a pension letter instead.
step1.frecuencia_salario: How often do you get paid? *
step1.frecuencia_hint: This determines how many payslips you must upload (3 if monthly, 6 if biweekly).

step2.title: Financial Documents
step2.hint: Upload your last 3 months of payslips and bank statements.
step2.payslips_explain: Upload one payslip per month — we use them to confirm your income.
step2.pension_explain: Upload the most recent pension letter.
step2.bancos_explain: Upload one statement per month — PDF only, downloaded from your internet banking.
step2.banco_pdf_only: PDF only — download from your bank's internet banking.
step2.comprobante_domicilio: 📄 Aqualectra, phone bill or Kranshi extract (optional)
step2.comprobante_hint: Proof of address. Any of these works.
step2.choose_tipo_first: First choose employment type and (if applicable) salary frequency in Step 1.

step3.title: Personal Information
step3.email_verify_hint: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it below:
step3.email_verify_check_spam: ⚠️ If you don't see it in your inbox, check Junk / Spam / Promotions too.
step3.email_verify_cooldown: Wait a few seconds before requesting another code.
step3.email_verify_exhausted: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
step3.email_verify_no_active: No active code. Request a new one.

step4.title: Health Declaration
step4.hint: For mandatory life insurance. All answers are confidential.
step4.medico: Who is your family doctor? (name or "none")
step4.q1: 1/6. Do you currently have any SERIOUS health complaints?
step4.q2: 2/6. Have you had an operation in the last 5 years?
step4.q3: 3/6. Do you currently have an illness, ailment or disability?
step4.q4: 4/6. Are you currently taking prescription medication?
step4.q5: 5/6. Do you have AIDS or are you HIV-positive?
step4.q7: 6/6. Is there anything else about your health that could affect the insurance?

step5.title: Contact and References
step5.beneficiario_hint: If you leave this empty, Reference 1 is used as beneficiary.

step6.title: Your Loan
step6.hint: Rate: 23.5% annual (standing order). Includes savings plan that CFL returns when you finish paying.
step6.monto: Amount you wish to borrow (multiples of 500 — 1000 to 4000 XCG)
step6.proposito: What will you use the loan for?

step7.title: Confirm Your Application
step7.hint: Review all information below. When you click "Submit", your application is registered.
step7.legal_health: Submitting this application declares have fully and truthfully answered the previous questions and is aware that afterward any incorrect or incomplete health declaration may lead to decline or modification of the rights under the insurance contract.
step7.legal_aska: Submitting the application, also declares that he/she has no objection to the medical advisor of Aska Insurance seeks medical information from his/her doctor or specialist.
step7.legal_credit_check: Submitting this application, we have been authorized to check your credit background with third party provider and this also allow to check your information with your employer.
step7.legal_credit_registration: Curacao Fast Loans N.V. participates in a system of credit registration and may perform credit checks as part of the acceptance and monitoring procedure relating to credits.
step7.terms: I confirm all information is correct and I accept CFL's Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.

done.title: Application submitted!
done.body: Your application has been received. A CFL agent will contact you within 3–5 days.
done.thanks: Thank you for your trust in Curaçao Fast Loans.

ocr.no_data: Could not extract data. Please fill the fields manually in the next step.
ocr.error: Could not read the document automatically. Please fill the fields manually in the next step.
ocr.received_async: Document received — will be analyzed when you submit
ocr.banco_received: Bank statement received ✓ — full analysis runs in backend
ocr.period_mismatch: Detected period: {detected}. This slot is for {expected}. Check that you uploaded the right file here.
